description: MiniClaw — AI-native plugin ecosystem by Mike O'Neal. Download MiniClaw, browse documentation, join the waitlist, and explore available plugins.

tools.name: download-miniclaw
tools.description: Download and install MiniClaw on macOS

tools.name: view-documentation
tools.description: Search MiniClaw documentation for setup guides, plugin APIs, and architecture details

tools.description: Join the MiniClaw waitlist to get notified when early access is available

tools.description: View all available MiniClaw plugins — memory, skills, persona, kanban, design, email, and more

tools.description: Chat with Am, the AI assistant (requires WebSocket connection)
